name: Arun Sanyasi
title: Instrumentation and Control Engineer
tagline: Industrial Automation | PLC | SCADA | DCS | Sensors | Raspberry Pi | ESP32
summary: Instrumentation and Control Engineering graduate from College of Science and Technology with hands-on exposure to PLC/SCADA commissioning, industrial electrical maintenance, switchyard systems, MCCs, motor-control wiring, capacitor banks, sensors, industrial networking, digitization workflows and project development.
weaknessStatement: One weakness I am working on is that sometimes I focus too much on technical details, especially when checking PLC logic, wiring, or sensor readings. I want everything to be accurate, so I may spend extra time verifying small details. However, I am improving this by planning my work better, setting priorities, and asking for feedback when needed. This helps me maintain accuracy while also completing tasks on time.
positiveProfile: Arun shows strong curiosity, persistence and care for engineering accuracy. He keeps improving through notes, project work, feedback and hands-on practice. He is especially suited to roles where troubleshooting, documentation, safety awareness and willingness to learn matter.

education.degree: B.E. in Instrumentation and Control Engineering
education.institution: College of Science and Technology, Royal University of Bhutan

experience.role: Graduate Engineer Trainee - Automation and Commissioning
experience.organization: Bhutan Automation and Engineering Limited, Dagachhu Hydropower Plant
experience.focus: Hydropower automation, desilter and dam control works
points: Developed ladder-logic control for inlet, outlet and flushing gate systems on Siemens SICAM A8000.
Built SCALA 250 SCADA/HMI screens for equipment status, alarms and gate visualization.
Performed point-to-point I/O verification, loop checks and field-wiring validation using EPLAN Electric P8 drawings.

experience.focus: Ferro-alloy plant, switchyard, MCC, motor-control wiring, capacitor bank and protection exposure
points: Traced field signals from sensors and instruments to panels across MCCs and 33kV/11kV electrical systems.
Observed switchyard operations, switchgear, protection relay practices, capacitor banks and capacitor discharge safety.
Reviewed motor-control wiring, preventive maintenance practices and CMMS-style maintenance records.

experience.focus: Handwritten bills and receipts digitization app, networking and troubleshooting
points: Supported an app for detecting handwritten bills and receipts and storing records in digital format.
Contributed to capture-to-storage workflow testing, detection review and structured digital archiving.
Worked on device configuration, networking basics and troubleshooting during workflow testing.

projects.title: Basic Health Monitoring Station
projects.description: Final-year biomedical kiosk for measuring BMI, pulse rate, SpO2, respiratory rate, body temperature, height and weight with real-time reporting and QR-code based handoff.

projects.title: PLC Based Dam Water Level Indicator and Control System
projects.description: Water-level monitoring and control logic for safer dam level management using PLC concepts, interlocks and level-control sequencing.

projects.title: SICAM A8000 Boiler Monitoring and SCADA Screens
projects.description: PLC/SCADA monitoring concept using SICAM Workbench and SCALA 250 for temperature, pressure and level-control loops.

projects.title: Material Handling and Conveyor Automation
projects.description: PLC and HMI practice around material handling, conveyor sequencing, sorting, filling, capping, storage and operator display logic.

projects.title: Smart Vehicle Accident Detector for Bhutanese Road Systems
projects.description: Accident detection and alerting concept designed for Bhutanese road conditions with embedded sensing and emergency-response thinking.

projects.title: Handwritten Bills and Receipt Digitization App
projects.description: Application workflow for detecting handwritten bills and receipts, reviewing captured information and storing records in digital format.

projects.title: Electrical Analysis Case Studies
projects.description: Case studies on solar microgrid with load management, AI-driven battery management systems for EVs and solid-state transformers for grid modernization.

documents: Project Management enrollment confirmation and course material
academicContributions: IEEE publication: Design and Development of a Basic Health Monitoring Station.
Participated in Student Research Meet organised by Royal University of Bhutan (RUB).
Final Year Major Project work covering hardware design, sensor calibration, GUI workflow, data handling and QR report generation.
